prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-BLE-GLASSKETTLE-WHT Product Type: ELECTRIC_WATER_BOILER Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 1.7L Minimalist Electric Kettle Water Boiler Kitchen Gadgets for Tea Description: A home appliance must have, Beille's electric kettle can boil up to 1.7L within minutes. The kettle features a blue LED boiling light, 360 rotation, 1500W heating element, cord wrap recess, cordless serving, boil-dry protection, and automatic shut off for safety and convenience in the kitchen.

All food-safe, this small kitchen appliances electric kettle features an ABS plastic handle and lid, borosilicate glass body, and stainless steel heating base; high quality, durable borosilicate glass material ensures the kettle will not crack under extreme temperature changes like regular glass and will ensure water remains of superior drinking quality.

And, calling all tea drinkers. Whether you're preparing a pot of earl grey tea for friends or a healthy mug of herbal tea for one, Beille's fast heating electric kettle boils water quickly with just the push of a button; conveniently, the kettle also comes with a removable mesh filter if you are adding loose leaf tea to the kettle after boiling.

Say au revoir to old, slow, and hot stovetop kettles. Beille's simple, modern and minimalist electric kettle design will look lovely on any kitchen countertop; the electric kettle features a soft blue LED indicator light to signal boiling water, making it easy to handle, even if you're in a dark kitchen. The blue LED light will shut off once the water has boiled, indicating water has reached boiling temperature.

Power: 120V; 1500W

Capacity: 1.7L (approx. 7 cups) Search Terms: electric kettle tea minimalist water boiler appliance gadget food prep college essentials house warming gifts home chef kitchen decor cookware sets bakeware organization silicone first beverage pantry storage Features: - BOROSILICATE GLASS ELECTRIC KETTLE: A home appliances must have, Beille's electric kettle can boil up to 1.7L within minutes! The kettle features a blue LED boiling light, 360 rotation, 1500W heating element, cord wrap recess, cordless serving, boil dry protection and automatic shut off for safety and convenience in the kitchen! - QUALITY FOOD SAFE MATERIALS: All food safe, this small kitchen appliances electric kettle features an ABS plastic handle and lid, borosilicate glass body and stainless steel heating base; high quality, durable borosilicate glass material ensures the kettle will not crack under extreme temperature changes like regular glass - PERFECT TEA KETTLE: Calling all tea drinkers! Whether you're preparing a pot of earl grey tea for friends or a healthy mug of herbal tea for one, Beille's fast heating electric kettle boils water quickly with just the push of a button; the kettle also comes with a removable mesh filter if you are adding loose leaf tea to the kettle after boiling - MINIMALIST MODERN KETTLE DESIGN: Say au revoir to old, slow and hot stovetop kettles! Beille's simple, modern and minimalist electric kettle design will look lovely on any kitchen countertop; the electric kettle features a soft blue LED indicator light to signal boiling water, making it easy to handle, even if you're in a dark kitchen - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 8.8 x 5.9 x 9.8 inches; Product Weight: 2.88lbs; Power: 120V, 1500W; Material: Plastic, Borosilicate Glass, Stainless Steel; Capacity: 1.7L (approx. 7 cups); Color: White === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: Borosilicate Glass, 1500W Fast Heating, Blue LED, Auto Shut-off, Cordless, Removable Mesh Filter
